channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9317] sanity-hsm test_24a: hsm restore failed because MDS failed to sync objects
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for bobijam <bobijam.xu@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/743319ea-1ec0-11e7-9de9-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_24a failed with the following error:

request on 0x200000402:0x1f:0x0 is not SUCCEED on mds1

MDS contains dead thread

12:50:22:[15480.097540] mdt00_003       D[15480.099481] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200000402:0x1f:0x0'.*action='RESTORE'/ {print $13}' | cut -f2 -d=
12:50:22:[15480.109156]  0000000000000000     0  1097      2 0x00000080
12:50:22:[15480.113707]  ffff88000055bb90 0000000000000046 ffff880016ad5e20 ffff88000055bfd8
12:50:22:[15480.116784]  ffff88000055bfd8 ffff88000055bfd8 ffff880016ad5e20 ffff8800663a0ac0
12:50:22:[15480.119721]  ffff8800663a0a10 ffff8800663a0ac8 ffff8800663a0a38 0000000000000000
12:50:22:[15480.122623] Call Trace:
12:50:22:[15480.125084]  [<ffffffff8168bd09>] schedule+0x29/0x70
12:50:22:[15480.127731]  [<ffffffffa06dd67d>] cv_wait_common+0x10d/0x130 [spl]
12:50:22:[15480.130415]  [<ffffffff810b17d0>] ? wake_up_atomic_t+0x30/0x30
12:50:22:[15480.133030]  [<ffffffffa06dd6b5>] __cv_wait+0x15/0x20 [spl]
12:50:22:[15480.135693]  [<ffffffffa07ec04f>] txg_wait_synced+0xdf/0x120 [zfs]
12:50:22:[15480.138351]  [<ffffffffa0f8d113>] osd_object_sync+0x103/0x170 [osd_zfs]
12:50:22:[15480.140990]  [<ffffffffa11ddbfb>] lod_object_sync+0x3b/0xd0 [lod]
12:50:22:[15480.143537]  [<ffffffffa1257831>] mdd_object_sync+0x61/0x180 [mdd]
12:50:22:[15480.146115]  [<ffffffffa1106e34>] mdt_sync+0x174/0x490 [mdt]
12:50:22:[15480.148584]  [<ffffffffa0d95c93>] ? req_capsule_server_pack+0x43/0xf0 [ptlrpc]
12:50:22:[15480.151101]  [<ffffffffa0dd2365>] tgt_request_handle+0x915/0x1320 [ptlrpc]
12:50:22:[15480.153551]  [<ffffffffa0d7bcfb>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x21b/0xa90 [ptlrpc]
12:50:22:[15480.156045]  [<ffffffffa0d798a8>] ? ptlrpc_wait_event+0x98/0x340 [ptlrpc]
12:50:22:[15480.158411]  [<ffffffff810c5092>] ? default_wake_function+0x12/0x20
12:50:22:[15480.160700]  [<ffffffff810ba2e8>] ? __wake_up_common+0x58/0x90
12:50:22:[15480.162948]  [<ffffffffa0d7fdd0>] ptlrpc_main+0xaa0/0x1de0 [ptlrpc]
12:50:22:[15480.165189]  [<ffffffffa0d7f330>] ? ptlrpc_register_service+0xe60/0xe60 [ptlrpc]
12:50:22:[15480.167477]  [<ffffffff810b06ff>] kthread+0xcf/0xe0
12:50:22:[15480.169542]  [<ffffffff810b0630>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140
12:50:22:[15480.171701]  [<ffffffff81696b98>] ret_from_fork+0x58/0x90
12:50:22:[15480.173742]  [<ffffffff810b0630>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140

Info required for matching: sanity-hsm 24a
item.summary: sanity-hsm test_24a: hsm restore failed because MDS failed to sync objects

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
